title: juniperus × media var. plumosa
intro: Juniperus × media var. plumosa is a cultivated variety of juniper that is often used in traditional herbal medicine, characterized by its compact, plumose foliage. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, which can help to combat urinary tract infections, improve digestion, and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Juniperus × media var. plumosa include its ability to aid in detoxification, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Juniper berries, a key component of this plant, can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
